name: design-brief-builder
description: When user wants to define design style or visual direction; after Brief, gates user to design-maker or explicit skip
intent: Interview the user on visual preferences, brand context, and design constraints to produce Design-Brief.md, then run Next Step Gate so new users are guided to /design-maker (or explicit skip)
author: ReqForge

when: User wants to define visual direction
Product-Spec complete but visual style unspecified
